incidents.event: The vessel was targeted 36 nautical miles north of Dubai and caught fire following an attack.
The empty tanker was attacked by two drones launched from Iran while transiting north of Fujairah. The vessel was operated by ADNOC.
The vessel was fired on and seized by IRGC gunboats while transiting the Strait of Hormuz. It was subsequently brought to Iran.
The vessel was fired on and seized by IRGC gunboats while transiting the Strait of Hormuz. It was subsequently brought to Iran.
The vessel was struck by a projectile while transiting the Strait of Hormuz, causing a fire on board. The IRGC claimed responsibility for the attack.
The vessel was attacked and damaged by IRGC gunboats while transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
The vessel was hit by a projectile off the coast of the United Arab Emirates. Damage was described as limited and the crew remained unharmed.
The vessel was hit by a projectile northwest of Dubai, causing damage to the hull. The crew was reported safe.
Two IRGC gunboats opened fire on a commercial tanker approximately 23 miles northeast of Oman.
The tanker was approached by two IRGC patrol boats and fired upon, resulting in damage to the bridge windows. The vessel and crew were reported safe.
The vessel was struck by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, causing damage to some containers. No fire was reported and the vessel remained operational.
The vessel was struck by two unidentified projectiles in the Arabian Sea southeast of Ras Al Hadd, causing a fire on board. The Pakistan Navy assisted in the response.
The vessel was struck by a projectile east of Khor Fakkan, sparking a fire. Fifteen crew members were evacuated, and the captain was reported missing.
The vessel was fired at and stopped by the IRGC after ignoring warnings while transiting the Strait of Hormuz.
The vessel was attacked by Iranian forces in the Strait of Hormuz after allegedly ignoring warnings to obtain transit permission. The crew was rescued by Omani authorities.
The vessel was struck above the waterline while transiting eastbound off the coast of Oman, causing a fire in the engine room. The crew abandoned the ship and were reported safe.
A tanker anchored southeast of Mubarak Al-Kabeer port in Kuwait was struck by a sea drone, causing an explosion on the port side and ballast water leakage. The crew remained unharmed.
